_comment: Base configuration for a 4-condition GRPO experiment. Pass this to run_experiment.py via --config, or override individual fields with CLI flags.
_comment_training: GRPO training hyperparameters (identical across all 4 conditions)
_comment_reward: Default reward weights: [format, process, consistency, outcome]
_comment_schedule: Adaptive scheduler settings (used only by the 'scheduled' condition)
_comment_conditions: Set to null to run all 4, or specify a subset
